case.title: CARDINAL SPORTING GOODS CO., INC., v. EAGLETON

opinion.h1: CARDINAL SPORTING GOODS CO., INC., v. EAGLETON, 374 U.S. 496 (1963)
opinion.h2: CARDINAL SPORTING GOODS CO., INC., ET AL. v. EAGLETON, ATTORNEY GENERAL OF MISSOURI, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF
opinion.p: No. 904. Decided June 17, 1963. Judgment vacated and case remanded with directions to dismiss complaint as moot.

It appearing from the motion to dismiss that this case is moot, the judgment of the United States District Court for the Eastern District of Missouri is vacated and the case is remanded with directions to dismiss the complaint as moot.
